posts.title: Introduction to React
posts.body: React is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces with a component-based architecture.

posts.title: Understanding State Management
posts.body: State management is crucial for building scalable applications. Redux Toolkit simplifies this process significantly.

posts.title: API Design Best Practices
posts.body: RESTful API design follows conventions for creating scalable and maintainable web services.

posts.title: TypeScript Tips
posts.body: TypeScript provides static type checking which helps catch errors during development.

posts.title: Modern Web Development
posts.body: Today's web development ecosystem includes powerful tools like Vite, React, and TypeScript.
